Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly covers '規模經濟、不完全競爭與國際貿易,' which are key drivers for industrialization (Target 9.2) and integrating enterprises into value chains (Target 9.3). The historical context of '工業時代' also supports this.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on '貿易政策' and '區域經濟整合' inherently involves the development and functioning of international rules-based institutions, directly linking to Targets 16.3 (rule of law) and 16.8 (participation in global governance).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is fundamentally about '國際貿易,' '貿易政策,' and '區域經濟整合,' directly aligning with Target 17.10 (multilateral trading system) and the broader concept of global partnerships for development.
